name: The White House
subject: Our Veterans Are a Priority
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0ae5650699593aea6b1a24b5eba7292f8a3c7a7f4183f78919a41ed9804df0a213ec3de05c7668fc6344b7ba9bc7424d00fecd1b0de84dd9

President Donald J. Trump continues to ensure that our Nation’s veterans are a priority in his administration. Yesterday, the President made that clear in his remarks to another great ally of veterans – the American Legion. He also signed a bill to ensure that veterans, our Nation’s heroes, have great and timely care.

-------------

President Trump Delivers Remarks to the American Legion's 99th National Convention

President Trump delivered remarks to the American Legion’s 99th National Convention yesterday in Reno, Nevada. The American Legion is a United States wartime veterans’ organization formed in 1919. They advocate on behalf of American veterans and were instrumental in passing the recently-signed Forever GI Bill.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0ae5650699593aeafa8f109fbef6e7350ed2ebb9b16615c6981595fd43e4797df3926fc2e5da0c550e939e0d90b5f10a311693943a54478f
Watch the video

President Trump Continues to Ensure Our Veterans Are a Priority

Yesterday, President Trump signed the Veterans Appeals Improvement and Modernization Act of 2017. This legislation will streamline the lengthy process that veterans undergo when appealing their claims for disability benefits with the Veterans Administration. More than 470,000 veterans are still waiting for decisions regarding their appeals.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0ae5650699593aea64c321cb86e8f13de90daa5499cbc0af59d980e2ae4beb4351fce9570bf24a199071a8d9a8d2ec7d289d203bea1faca9
Read more

"Working together, we will achieve a peaceable solution to the Venezuelan crisis"

Yesterday, Vice President Pence was in Miami, Florida, to participate in a listening session with Venezuelan exiles, activists, and community leaders. He also delivered remarks to the community.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0ae5650699593aeacd505638de7e1a823e216cbaadc4f9e469f8ea598aab890570805e7f38914bf31f77b3abcd3388acf6bb3bbfb8ee8be1
Read more

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: The IRS battle rages on
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this email, view it online.

Hi Supporter -

Our lawsuit against the IRS is making
headlines - and we're making headway! Last week, U.S. District
Court Judge Reggie Walton ordered the IRS to start releasing
names and documents. In fact, he outright asked IRS attorneys
why they continue to "hide the ball."

We put together a quick video to bring you up
to speed….

The bottom line is that our battle against
the IRS is still in full swing. It's been a long four years, but
we cannot quit.

What the IRS did, to me, to True the Vote,
and to thousands of other organizations and individuals, is
unconstitutional, unconscionable, and unacceptable.

Make no mistake; the IRS can and will
continue in their targeting schemes unless and until they are
forced to stop. We must see this effort through to conclusion.
But we need your help.

This fight against the IRS is about far more
than what they did to True the Vote. It's about protecting our
collective civil rights. A win in this case will produce future
protections that we will all benefit from.

Sometimes fundraising requests make their
causes seem too surreal to really connect with. This is a very,
very real fight. And we will keep fighting…with your
help. Please help support our legal battle to end IRS targeting.

Working together we can win this….and,
together we can and will true the vote.

Onward,

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

Office

713.401.3550

Mail

P.O. Box
131768
Houston,
TX 77219-1768

info@truethevote.org

nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: When Paul Ryan comes to town...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If Republicans in the other Washington want to know how to take care of America's working people, they need look no further than Washington state.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTE3NjM0ODUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjE0NDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, Today, Paul Ryan is visiting Everett, Washington. He's here as part of an effort to raise millions from corporate insiders so he can maintain his party's grasp on power -- the problem is his party is getting it all wrong. If Paul Ryan and the Republicans in the other Washington want to know how to stand up for America's working people and grow the economy, they need look no further than Washington state. Here in Washington state we are doing it right. We have passed the most inclusive paid family leave policy in the nation. We have one of the highest minimum wages in the nation. We are making massive investments in our kids and students so they are prepared for their future. We are investing in our infrastructure and our mental health systems. And according to CNBC, our economy is the best in the nation! This is all because we invest in our workers and embrace a culture of diversity. Clearly a lesson the other Washington needs to learn. Paul Ryan and his Republican caucus are clinging to their failed policies and worn out talking points. And they are desperately trying to propel President Trump's extreme agenda -- whether it's cuts to health care, attacks on workers, discriminatory immigration policies, and tax cuts for those who need it the least. Meanwhile, our Washington is getting work done and making sure its people are getting a better deal. I'm tired of what's coming out of Washington D.C., and I'm sure you are too. While he's here, Speaker Ryan needs to hear from us loud and clear -- if he actually cared about people he'd leave Washington state with big, bipartisan ideas for creating an economy that works for everyone, instead of a pocketful of political cash. [**Chip in to our fight for economic security for families in Washington -- and send a message to Paul Ryan that Republicans are getting it all wrong.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE3NjM0ODUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjE0NDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) I've said it before, and I'll say it again: Now more than ever, it is time for state governments to step up for their citizens and their economic future. Donald Trump and Paul Ryan might be distracted by the latest tweet or D.C. controversy -- but we're staying on what matters: building a better future for our state. That's what I'm doing, but I'll need your help to make sure we stay strong. [**Please, donate today, while Paul Ryan is in town, to stand up for the working families of Washington today.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE3NjM0ODUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjE0NDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0) We can do this -- we can send a loud and clear message to Paul Ryan and Donald Trump -- but we have to work together. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTE3NjM0ODUS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTIyMjE0NDA3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: We're going to the states where Republicans are attacking women >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66b6/24c69fd9/ac35f6bf/189bd60f/1931862699/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact")
---

Peter,

State Republicans can't get enough of attacking women.

Texas just passed a sweeping anti-choice bill that includes mandatory "fetal funerals" and bans one of the safest forms of abortion.

In Iowa, when lawmakers were debating an abortion ban, a Republican official said a woman should carry a nonviable pregnancy to term regardless of her own health.

Thanks to Republican inaction, North Carolina is the only state in the country that doesn't consider it rape if a woman revokes consent during sex.

After all that bad news, I promise there's some good news too: We are going to these states and more to train pro-choice Democratic women on how to run for state and local office. These are the women who can take on the anti-choice Republicans who care more about controlling women than improving life for families.

**[Donate $3 to help train and support women who can defeat Republicans at the local level and stop these attacks.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66b6/24c69fd9/ac35f6bf/189bd608/1931862699/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170823_email_StatesAntiWomenAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+train+and+support+women&utm_campaign=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact")**

In state legislatures nationwide, Republicans have made it their personal business to go after women's rights. State legislatures have successfully passed a whopping 300 abortion restrictions in the past seven years.

In June, Iowa lost nearly one-third of its Planned Parenthood clinics -- the result of a GOP campaign to defund the provider in the state. And in Florida, accessing women's health care is becoming increasingly difficult as an estimated 73 percent of counties have no abortion clinics.

Bottom line: As long as Republicans control 32 state legislatures and 34 governorships, we can expect to see more bad legislation like this.

That's why we have to train as many women as we can to take them on in 2018 and beyond.

**Donate $3 to help recruit, train, and elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic women at the state and local level who can put us back on a path to progress:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Take-On-Republicans](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c66b6/24c69fd9/ac35f6bf/189bd609/1931862699/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170823_email_StatesAntiWomenAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgTakeOnRepublican&utm_campaign=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact&source=WQEFE847N_digital_email_20170824_StatesAntiWomenAttacks_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

subject: ALERT: Trump is targeting our seniors
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, Eighty-two years ago, former President Franklin Delano Roosevelt made a promise to our seniors when he signed Social Security into law -- if you work hard and pay into Social Security, Social Security will be there for you. Millions of seniors were lifted out of poverty. Democrats have made good on the promise that our seniors deserve the chance to retire with dignity. **Now, President Trump and Republicans are trying to break that promise.** Trump has called for more than $64 billion in budget cuts to Social Security Disability Insurance. SSDI provides for workers who have become disabled before their 65th birthday as well as for their families in the event of their passing. [_**Don 't allow Republicans to jeopardize the financial security and well-being of seniors and the disabled. Add your name.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2f/622b7b5b/546051d/307bdbe3/2701177774/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170824z") I am proud to represent the more than 100,000 individuals who are enrolled in Social Security in my district. **Social Security beneficiaries in Florida contribute more than $123 billion to our state economy.** They are creating jobs and contributing to our communities. [_**I have every intention of keeping the promise of Social Security. Sign your name and stand with me.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e2f/622b7b5b/546051d/307bdbe3/2701177774/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e170824z") Thank you, Debbie |

name: New Hampshire Republican Party
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Senator Shaheen's Support of Senator Sanders' Single-Payer Health Care Plan
body:
**PRESS RELEASE**

**For Immediate Release: August 24, 2017**
**Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310**

**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Senator Shaheen's Support of Senator Sanders' Single-Payer Health Care Plan**

**Concord -** Today, NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding Senator Shaheen's comments on the NHPR Exchange supporting Senator Sanders' Single-Payer plan:

"New Hampshire voters should understand how significant Senator Shaheen's statement is - a full endorsement of a socialist takeover of our health care system. We now know why Senator Shaheen obstructed Republican free market health care reforms. Granite Staters cannot afford ObamaCare and certainly won’t be able to support SandersCare."

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: A special message from Bernie
body:
One year ago today, Senator Bernie Sanders outlined
#
Friends,
One year ago today, Senator Bernie Sanders outlined the next steps of the political revolution. What had started as a small, seemingly isolated phenomenon quickly became much more. The movement that he inspired would continue. Our Revolution began.
Please watch a personal message from Bernie on the state of Our Revolution commemorating our first birthday:
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98bd/2690157522/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/PoliticalRevolution/videos/1615384805180396/?source=em170824-full")
Our Revolution is powered by the largest grassroots force in history, an army of small dollar donors and volunteers ready to take our country back from the oligarchy that has controlled our future for far too long. **We still have a future to believe in. Please help grow the revolution by forwarding this email to your family and friends, ask them to sign up, and help build our progressive movement for the years to come.**
This movement is greater than Bernie Sanders, or myself, or any one individual. It is about all of us working together to forge a future of promise, hope, and destiny. Together, we are the change. Thank you again for being a part of this revolution.
[**You are the force driving Our Revolution.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98bd/2690157522/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/PoliticalRevolution/videos/1615384805180396/?source=em170824-full") We are grateful to have you by our side.
Forward.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98bc/2690157522/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98bf/2690157522/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98be/2690157522/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7af9b/bed43eb/ab75e5c/75ff98b9/2690157522/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

body:
This week, we finally got a look at the GOP's newly redrawn maps. As Roy said, these maps make clear the need for a non-partisan redistricting process in North Carolina.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120321a/2fde7c66/45be52b9/15695fa2/701541953/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-redistricting?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_170824_maps_adv_gq_ful__tc&source=em17_170824_maps_adv_gq_ful__tc")
---
Friend,

This week, we finally got a look at the GOP's newly redrawn maps. As Roy said, these maps make clear the need for a non-partisan redistricting process in North Carolina.

The new maps, which were drawn behind closed doors with no transparency, do nothing to fix the old maps that were struck down by the Supreme Court.
